sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41973" key="e(ptamelh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑπτα-μελής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n41973.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having seven members,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg010:2:209D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.209D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
